mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `ir_auth`.`users` WHERE `id` = #{userId} AND `deleted_at` IS NULL AND `status` = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM `ir_auth`.`users` WHERE `id` = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM `ir_auth`.`users` WHERE LOWER(`email`) = LOWER(#{email}) LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE `ir_auth`.`users`
`avatar_url` = #{values.avatar_url}, `display_name` = #{values.display_name}, `bio` = #{values.bio}, `real_name_visible` = #{values.real_name_visible}, `gender` = #{values.gender}, `birthday` = #{values.birthday}, `country` = #{values.country}, `province` = #{values.province}, `city` = #{values.city}, `district` = #{values.district}, `ntrp_rating` = #{values.ntrp_rating}, `player_identity` = #{values.player_identity}, `dominant_hand` = #{values.dominant_hand}, `updated_at` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE `id` = #{userId} AND `deleted_at` IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT `gender_visible`, `birthday_visible`, `region_visible`, `habit_courts_visible`, `following_list_visible`, `follower_list_visible`, `activity_records_visible` FROM `ir_profile`.`user_profile_permission_settings` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `status` = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `ir_profile`.`user_profile_permission_settings` (`id`, `user_id`, `gender_visible`, `birthday_visible`, `region_visible`, `habit_courts_visible`, `following_list_visible`, `follower_list_visible`, `activity_records_visible`, `status`) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{values.gender_visible}, #{values.birthday_visible}, #{values.region_visible}, #{values.habit_courts_visible}, #{values.following_list_visible}, #{values.follower_list_visible}, #{values.activity_records_visible}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `gender_visible` = VALUES(`gender_visible`), `birthday_visible` = VALUES(`birthday_visible`), `region_visible` = VALUES(`region_visible`), `habit_courts_visible` = VALUES(`habit_courts_visible`), `following_list_visible` = VALUES(`following_list_visible`), `follower_list_visible` = VALUES(`follower_list_visible`), `activity_records_visible` = VALUES(`activity_records_visible`), `status` = 0, `updated_at` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO `ir_fitness`.`fitness_sync_sources` (`id`, `user_id`, `source_name`, `source_bundle_id`, `device_name`, `device_model`, `last_sync_at`, `permission_snapshot`, `status`) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{values.source_name}, #{values.source_bundle_id}, #{values.device_name}, #{values.device_model}, #{values.last_sync_at}, #{values.permission_snapshot}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `device_name` = VALUES(`device_name`), `device_model` = VALUES(`device_model`), `last_sync_at` = VALUES(`last_sync_at`), `permission_snapshot` = VALUES(`permission_snapshot`), `status` = 0, `updated_at` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO `ir_fitness`.`fitness_workout_sessions` (`id`, `user_id`, `healthkit_uuid`, `sport_type`, `started_at`, `ended_at`, `duration_seconds`, `active_energy_kcal`, `basal_energy_kcal`, `total_energy_kcal`, `distance_meters`, `avg_heart_rate`, `max_heart_rate`, `heart_rate_zones`, `pace_seconds_per_km`, `speed_mps`, `elevation_gain_meters`, `cadence`, `stroke_count`, `source_name`, `source_bundle_id`, `device_model`, `notes`, `raw_payload`, `status`) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{values.healthkit_uuid}, #{values.sport_type}, #{values.started_at}, #{values.ended_at}, #{values.duration_seconds}, #{values.active_energy_kcal}, #{values.basal_energy_kcal}, #{values.total_energy_kcal}, #{values.distance_meters}, #{values.avg_heart_rate}, #{values.max_heart_rate}, #{values.heart_rate_zones}, #{values.pace_seconds_per_km}, #{values.speed_mps}, #{values.elevation_gain_meters}, #{values.cadence}, #{values.stroke_count}, #{values.source_name}, #{values.source_bundle_id}, #{values.device_model}, #{values.notes}, #{values.raw_payload}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `sport_type` = VALUES(`sport_type`), `started_at` = VALUES(`started_at`), `ended_at` = VALUES(`ended_at`), `duration_seconds` = VALUES(`duration_seconds`), `active_energy_kcal` = VALUES(`active_energy_kcal`), `basal_energy_kcal` = VALUES(`basal_energy_kcal`), `total_energy_kcal` = VALUES(`total_energy_kcal`), `distance_meters` = VALUES(`distance_meters`), `avg_heart_rate` = VALUES(`avg_heart_rate`), `max_heart_rate` = VALUES(`max_heart_rate`), `heart_rate_zones` = VALUES(`heart_rate_zones`), `pace_seconds_per_km` = VALUES(`pace_seconds_per_km`), `speed_mps` = VALUES(`speed_mps`), `elevation_gain_meters` = VALUES(`elevation_gain_meters`), `cadence` = VALUES(`cadence`), `stroke_count` = VALUES(`stroke_count`), `source_name` = VALUES(`source_name`), `source_bundle_id` = VALUES(`source_bundle_id`), `device_model` = VALUES(`device_model`), `notes` = VALUES(`notes`), `raw_payload` = VALUES(`raw_payload`), `status` = 0, `updated_at` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO `ir_fitness`.`fitness_daily_summaries` (`id`, `user_id`, `summary_date`, `step_count`, `flights_climbed`, `walking_running_meters`, `cycling_meters`, `swimming_meters`, `basal_energy_kcal`, `active_energy_kcal`, `stand_minutes`, `exercise_minutes`, `activity_ring_kcal`, `exercise_ring_minutes`, `stand_ring_hours`, `source_name`, `raw_payload`, `status`) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{values.summary_date}, #{values.step_count}, #{values.flights_climbed}, #{values.walking_running_meters}, #{values.cycling_meters}, #{values.swimming_meters}, #{values.basal_energy_kcal}, #{values.active_energy_kcal}, #{values.stand_minutes}, #{values.exercise_minutes}, #{values.activity_ring_kcal}, #{values.exercise_ring_minutes}, #{values.stand_ring_hours}, #{values.source_name}, #{values.raw_payload}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `step_count` = VALUES(`step_count`), `flights_climbed` = VALUES(`flights_climbed`), `walking_running_meters` = VALUES(`walking_running_meters`), `cycling_meters` = VALUES(`cycling_meters`), `swimming_meters` = VALUES(`swimming_meters`), `basal_energy_kcal` = VALUES(`basal_energy_kcal`), `active_energy_kcal` = VALUES(`active_energy_kcal`), `stand_minutes` = VALUES(`stand_minutes`), `exercise_minutes` = VALUES(`exercise_minutes`), `activity_ring_kcal` = VALUES(`activity_ring_kcal`), `exercise_ring_minutes` = VALUES(`exercise_ring_minutes`), `stand_ring_hours` = VALUES(`stand_ring_hours`), `source_name` = VALUES(`source_name`), `raw_payload` = VALUES(`raw_payload`), `status` = 0, `updated_at` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `ir_profile`.`tennis_profiles` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `status` = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM `ir_profile`.`player_skill_profiles` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `status` = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM `ir_profile`.`playing_habits` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `status` = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT c.`id`, c.`name`, c.`address`, c.`country`, c.`province`, c.`city`, c.`contact_phone`, c.`description`, c.`venue_status`, NULL AS `approval_status`, c.`latitude`, c.`longitude`, c.`surface_type`, c.`indoor_outdoor`, c.`has_indoor`, c.`has_outdoor`, c.`total_court_count`, c.`indoor_court_count`, c.`outdoor_court_count`, c.`opening_time`, c.`closing_time`, c.`created_by`, u.`display_name` AS creator_name, hc.`is_primary` FROM `ir_profile`.`playing_habits` ph JOIN `ir_profile`.`habit_courts` hc ON hc.`habit_id` = ph.`id` AND hc.`status` = 0 JOIN `ir_profile`.`courts` c ON c.`id` = hc.`court_id` AND c.`status` = 0 LEFT JOIN `ir_auth`.`users` u ON u.`id` = c.`created_by` AND u.`status` = 0 WHERE ph.`user_id` = #{userId} AND ph.`status` = 0 ORDER BY hc.`is_primary` DESC, c.`name`

SELECT `id`, `session_type`, `title`, `started_at`, `duration_minutes`, `court_id`, `court_name`, `notes` FROM `ir_activity`.`play_sessions` WHERE `owner_id` = #{userId} AND `sport_type` = 'tennis' AND `status` = 0 ORDER BY `started_at` DESC LIMIT 2

SELECT ps.`id`, ps.`owner_id`, u.`display_name` AS owner_name, u.`avatar_url` AS owner_avatar_url, ps.`session_type`, ps.`title`, ps.`started_at`, ps.`duration_minutes`, ps.`court_id`, ps.`court_name`, ps.`notes`, c.`city`, NULL AS `district`, c.`address` FROM `ir_activity`.`play_sessions` ps LEFT JOIN `ir_auth`.`users` u ON u.`id` = ps.`owner_id` AND u.`status` = 0 LEFT JOIN `ir_profile`.`courts` c ON c.`id` = ps.`court_id` AND c.`status` = 0 WHERE ps.`owner_id` = #{userId} AND ps.`status` = 0 ORDER BY ps.`started_at` DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT ps.`id`, ps.`owner_id`, u.`display_name` AS owner_name, u.`avatar_url` AS owner_avatar_url, ps.`session_type`, ps.`title`, ps.`started_at`, ps.`duration_minutes`, ps.`court_id`, ps.`court_name`, ps.`notes`, c.`city`, NULL AS `district`, c.`address` FROM `ir_activity`.`player_relationship_edges` fe INNER JOIN `ir_activity`.`play_sessions` ps ON ps.`owner_id` = fe.`peer_user_id` AND ps.`status` = 0 INNER JOIN `ir_profile`.`user_profile_permission_settings` ups ON ups.`user_id` = ps.`owner_id` AND ups.`activity_records_visible` = 1 AND ups.`status` = 0 LEFT JOIN `ir_auth`.`users` u ON u.`id` = ps.`owner_id` AND u.`status` = 0 LEFT JOIN `ir_profile`.`courts` c ON c.`id` = ps.`court_id` AND c.`status` = 0 WHERE fe.`user_id` = #{userId} AND fe.`status` = 0 ORDER BY ps.`started_at` DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT ps.`id`, ps.`owner_id`, u.`display_name` AS owner_name, u.`avatar_url` AS owner_avatar_url, ps.`session_type`, ps.`title`, ps.`started_at`, ps.`duration_minutes`, ps.`court_id`, ps.`court_name`, ps.`notes`, c.`city`, NULL AS `district`, c.`address` FROM `ir_activity`.`play_sessions` ps LEFT JOIN `ir_auth`.`users` u ON u.`id` = ps.`owner_id` AND u.`status` = 0 LEFT JOIN `ir_profile`.`courts` c ON c.`id` = ps.`court_id` AND c.`status` = 0 WHERE ps.`id` = #{sessionId} AND ps.`status` = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT ps.`healthkit_uuid` FROM `ir_activity`.`play_sessions` ps WHERE ps.`owner_id` = #{userId} AND ps.`status` = 0 AND ps.`healthkit_uuid` IS NOT NULL
AND ps.`healthkit_uuid` IN
#{uuid}
AND 1 = 0

SELECT ps.`id`, ps.`owner_id`, u.`display_name` AS owner_name, u.`avatar_url` AS owner_avatar_url, ps.`session_type`, ps.`title`, ps.`started_at`, ps.`duration_minutes`, ps.`court_id`, ps.`court_name`, ps.`notes`, c.`city`, NULL AS `district`, c.`address` FROM `ir_activity`.`play_sessions` ps LEFT JOIN `ir_auth`.`users` u ON u.`id` = ps.`owner_id` AND u.`status` = 0 LEFT JOIN `ir_profile`.`courts` c ON c.`id` = ps.`court_id` AND c.`status` = 0 WHERE ps.`owner_id` = #{userId} AND ps.`healthkit_uuid` = #{healthkitUuid} AND ps.`status` = 0 ORDER BY ps.`started_at` DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ce.`id`, ce.`organizer_id`, u.`display_name` AS organizer_name, u.`avatar_url`, ce.`title`, ce.`court_id`, COALESCE(ce.`court_name`, c.`name`) AS court_name, COALESCE(ce.`country`, c.`country`) AS country, COALESCE(ce.`province`, c.`province`) AS province, COALESCE(ce.`city`, c.`city`) AS city, ce.`district`, ce.`started_at`, ce.`ended_at`, ce.`match_type`, ce.`needed_players`, ce.`min_level`, ce.`max_level`, ce.`price_mode`, ce.`price_per_person`, ce.`gender_requirement`, ce.`note` FROM `ir_club`.`club_events` ce LEFT JOIN `ir_auth`.`users` u ON u.`id` = ce.`organizer_id` AND u.`status` = 0 AND u.`deleted_at` IS NULL LEFT JOIN `ir_profile`.`courts` c ON c.`id` = ce.`court_id` AND c.`status` = 0 WHERE ce.`id` = #{eventId} AND ce.`status` = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT c.`id`, c.`country`, c.`province`, c.`city`, c.`area_code`, c.`name`, c.`address`, c.`latitude`, c.`longitude`, c.`surface_type`, c.`indoor_outdoor`, c.`has_indoor`, c.`has_outdoor`, c.`total_court_count`, c.`indoor_court_count`, c.`outdoor_court_count`, c.`opening_time`, c.`closing_time`, c.`contact_phone`, c.`description`, c.`amenities`, c.`venue_status`, c.`approval_status`, c.`operator_managed`, c.`created_by`, u.`display_name` AS creator_name, c.`status` FROM `ir_profile`.`courts` c LEFT JOIN `ir_auth`.`users` u ON u.`id` = c.`created_by` AND u.`status` = 0 WHERE c.`status` = 0
AND (c.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.`address` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.`city` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.`province` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.`surface_type` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY c.`venue_status` = 'active' DESC,
c.`city` = #{city} DESC,
c.`province` = #{province} DESC,
c.`country` = #{country} DESC,
c.`name` LIMIT 100

SELECT u.`id`, u.`display_name`, u.`avatar_url`, u.`gender`, u.`ntrp_rating`, u.`country`, u.`province`, u.`city`, u.`district`, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `ir_activity`.`player_relationship_edges` fre WHERE fre.`user_id` = u.`id` AND fre.`status` = 0) AS following_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `ir_activity`.`player_relationship_edges` fre WHERE fre.`peer_user_id` = u.`id` AND fre.`status` = 0) AS follower_count,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `ir_activity`.`player_relationship_edges` rel WHERE rel.`user_id` = #{currentUserId} AND rel.`peer_user_id` = u.`id` AND rel.`status` = 0 ) AS is_following,
0 AS is_following,
c.`name` AS court_name, hc.`is_primary` FROM `ir_auth`.`users` u
INNER JOIN `ir_activity`.`player_relationship_edges` fe ON fe.`peer_user_id` = u.`id` AND fe.`user_id` = #{currentUserId} AND fe.`status` = 0
LEFT JOIN `ir_profile`.`playing_habits` ph ON ph.`user_id` = u.`id` AND ph.`status` = 0 LEFT JOIN `ir_profile`.`habit_courts` hc ON hc.`habit_id` = ph.`id` AND hc.`status` = 0 LEFT JOIN `ir_profile`.`courts` c ON c.`id` = hc.`court_id` AND c.`status` = 0 WHERE u.`deleted_at` IS NULL AND u.`status` = 0 AND u.`display_name` IS NOT NULL AND u.`display_name` != '' AND u.`id` != #{currentUserId}
AND (u.`display_name` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.`email` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.`display_name`, hc.`is_primary` DESC, c.`name` LIMIT #{rowLimit}

SELECT c.*, u.`display_name` AS creator_name FROM `ir_profile`.`courts` c LEFT JOIN `ir_auth`.`users` u ON u.`id` = c.`created_by` AND u.`status` = 0 WHERE c.`id` = #{courtId} AND c.`status` = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM `ir_profile`.`courts` WHERE `name` = #{name} AND `status` = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `ir_profile`.`court_likes` WHERE `court_id` = #{courtId} AND `status` = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `ir_profile`.`court_change_requests` WHERE `court_id` = #{courtId} AND `request_status` = 'pending' AND `status` = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `ir_profile`.`habit_courts` (`id`, `habit_id`, `court_id`, `is_primary`, `status`) VALUES (#{id}, #{habitId}, #{courtId}, #{isPrimary}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `is_primary` = VALUES(`is_primary`), `status` = 0
INSERT INTO `ir_profile`.`tennis_profile_strength_tags` (`id`, `profile_id`, `tag`, `status`) VALUES (#{id}, #{profileId}, #{tag}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `status` = 0
mapper.select: SELECT `tag` FROM `ir_profile`.`tennis_profile_strength_tags` WHERE `profile_id` = #{profileId} AND `status` = 0 ORDER BY `tag`

SELECT hws.`day_of_week`, hws.`start_time`, hws.`end_time` FROM `ir_profile`.`playing_habits` ph JOIN `ir_profile`.`habit_weekly_slots` hws ON hws.`habit_id` = ph.`id` AND hws.`status` = 0 WHERE ph.`user_id` = #{userId} AND ph.`status` = 0 ORDER BY hws.`day_of_week`, hws.`start_time` LIMIT 3
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `ir_activity`.`player_relationship_edges` (`id`, `user_id`, `peer_user_id`, `total_sessions`, `relationship_strength`, `status`) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{targetUserId}, 0, 0.00, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `status` = 0, `updated_at` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `ir_activity`.`player_relationship_edges` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `status` = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `ir_activity`.`player_relationship_edges` WHERE `peer_user_id` = #{userId} AND `status` = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`like_count`), 0) FROM `ir_social`.`feed_posts` WHERE `author_id` = #{userId} AND `status` = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `ir_profile`.`equipment_bags` b JOIN `ir_profile`.`rackets` r ON r.`bag_id` = b.`id` AND r.`status` = 0 WHERE b.`user_id` = #{userId} AND b.`status` = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `ir_profile`.`equipment_bags` b JOIN `ir_profile`.`tennis_shoes` s ON s.`bag_id` = b.`id` AND s.`status` = 0 WHERE b.`user_id` = #{userId} AND b.`status` = 0
SELECT * FROM `ir_profile`.`equipment_bags` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} AND `status` = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT `id`, `brand`, `model`, `model_zh`, `unstrung_weight_gram`, `string_pattern`, `balance_point_mm`, `length_inch`, `grip_size`, `release_year`, `image_url` FROM `ir_profile`.`racket_catalog` WHERE `status` = 0 ORDER BY `brand`, `model`, `release_year` DESC, `grip_size` LIMIT 500

SELECT `id`, `brand`, `model`, `model_zh`, `unstrung_weight_gram`, `string_pattern`, `balance_point_mm`, `length_inch`, `grip_size`, `release_year`, `image_url` FROM `ir_profile`.`racket_catalog` WHERE `id` = #{catalogId} AND `status` = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT `id`, `player_name`, `brand`, `model`, `usage_year`, `notes` FROM `ir_profile`.`racket_player_usages` WHERE `brand` = #{brand} AND `model` = #{model} AND `status` = 0 ORDER BY `usage_year` DESC, `player_name` LIMIT 100
